title: pothuava drakeana
intro: Pothuava drakeana, also known as the  Polynesian arrowroot, is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its edible rhizomes and tubers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including the ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Pothuava drakeana include its potential to lower blood pressure, aid in weight management, and provide relief from symptoms of diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Pothuava drakeana include boiled tubers, which can be consumed as a starchy food, and infusions of the leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
